title: Old Rules
summary: A retro escape game about sneaking through Grandma's house, finding keys, and avoiding trouble.
description: Choose a player, dodge the grandparents and Mr. Whiskers, collect keys, and escape the house.
dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult preview may be useful because the theme includes sneaking and being chased.
safety.notes: Retro escape game with cartoon household trouble and mild chase tension.
